features: [Medium Gift Bags]: The gift bag size is 11 "x7.9" x3.6 "/28x20x9cm, Suitable for gifts weighing less than 4.4lb/2kg, Can accommodate most small gifts. You will get 4 exquisite navy gift bags, which come in black and white to meet your different needs.

[Hi-Q]: The gift bag for present is made of superior paper materials, long lasting and recyclable. They are thick enough to hold objects well and do not break easily. Gift paper bags are also waterproof and dust-proof to keep your gifts clean and tidy.

[Increase the Gift Texture]: the simple and elegant appearance and excellent quality of the gift bag, coupled with a beautiful bow, makes the gift bag look more high-end atmosphere, so that your gift appears more careful and the other party likes your gift more.

[Widely Uses]: Simple classic gift bag, moderate size, can be used to hold clothing, scarves, trinkets, books, cosmetics, etc., very suitable for Christmas, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Fathers day, wedding gift bags, bridesmaid gift bags, baby shower gift bags, birthday bags for presents and other occasions, practical and fashionable.

[Satisfaction Guaranteed]: We want each of your gifts to make people feel thoughtful. If for any reason you are not satisfied with our gift bags, please do not hesitate to contact us - we are here to help. So don't wait, order now to add warmth to your gift!
